arts.sum: Arsenal will be eager to bounce back from their disappointing weekend result when they host Shakhtar Donetsk in the Champions League on Tuesday evening. The...

arts.ttl: Arsenal learn new Howard Webb theory as William Saliba red card saga takes another twist
arts.sum: Webb, the chief of the PGMOL, was in attendance at the Vitality Stadium for the Premier League clash and he was spotted on his phone during the VAR check, sparking online speculation that he might have influenced the decision . Richard Keys has chimed in on the controversy over Howard Webb and his potential role in William Saliba's red card incident against Bournemouth.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta has easy Ethan Nwaneri decision to make for Arsenal vs Shakhtar
arts.sum: Nwaneri came off it for his longest Premier League stint this season, playing the final nine minutes in trying circumstances with his team two goals and a player down. It might be his only opportunity for prolonged minutes in the Champions League for the rest of 2024, with Inter Milan next before an away trip to Sporting Lisbon and a home tie with AS Monaco, who have got off to a brilliant start in Ligue 1 this season.

arts.ttl: Premier League make major referee decision after Arsenal William Saliba red card controversy
arts.sum: The VAR on duty for Bournemouth vs Arsenal was Jarred Gillett and he deemed Jones to have made a clear and obvious error in only showing Saliba a yellow card, suggesting it be upgraded to red. Match official Rob Jones initially gave the Arsenal centre-back a yellow card when he brought down Bournemouth striker Evanilson just over the halfway line.

arts.ttl: Merino hails 'magic' Arsenal star after 'long journey'
arts.sum: Merino hails 'magic' Arsenal star after 'long journey' Mikel Merino has revealed how excited he is to be reunited with Martin Odegaard at Arsenal .

arts.ttl: Saliba to miss Liverpool clash - how big a miss will he be?
arts.sum: Arsenal will be without William Saliba for Sunday's crucial match with Liverpool on Sunday, live on Sky Sports - so how big a miss will he be?

arts.ttl: Jack Wilshere: Reason for Arsenal exit emerges with new role starting immediately
arts.sum: Jack Wilshere will leave his job as Arsenal Under 18s manager after two years leading the side to start his first role in senior coaching, with the 32-year-old departing the Gunners this week

arts.ttl: Arne Slot told Liverpool CAN win Premier League - as Arsenal issued damning warning
arts.sum: Arne Slot has enjoyed a dream start to life at Liverpool and former Reds midfielder Didi Hamann believes his old club can go all the way in the Premier League title race this year

arts.ttl: 'Listen': Tony Adams takes dig at Tottenham as he discusses Arsenal's Champions League chances this season
